case_title: CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA) N.A. VS. ISRAEL SANTIAGO et al

docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR JAN-22-2014 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
NOTICE OF SETTLEMENT , CONDITIONAL, FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA) N.A.
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA) N.A. SERVED JUN-05-2013, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SANTIAGO, ISRAEL
MEMORANDUM OF POINTS AND AUTHORITIES IN SUPPORT OF MOTION FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA) N.A.

DISCOVERY 302, PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA) N.A.'S MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSE TO DISCOVERY, ORDER FOR THE GENUINENESS OF DOCUMENTS AND TRUTH OF MATTERS ASSERTED IS GRANTED. DEFENDANT HAS WAIVED ALL OBJECTIONS TO THE DISCOVERY BY FAILING TO RESPOND. WITHIN 30 DAYS DEFENDANT SHALL SERVE VERIFIED, CODE-COMPLIANT RESPONSES WITHOUT OBJECTIONS TO PLAINTIFF'S FIRST SET OF SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES AND FIRST SET OF REQUESTS FOR INSPECTION AND PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS, AND SHALL PRODUCE ALL RESPONSIVE DOCUMENTS IN DEFENDANT'S CARE, CUSTODY, OR CONTROL. PLAINTIFF'S REQUESTS FOR ADMISSIONS - SET ONE ARE DEEMED ADMITTED BY DEFENDANT. AFTER HEARING, THE COURT SIGNED THE PROPOSED ORDER SUBMITTED WITH THE MOVING PAPERS. JUDGE PRO TEM: ERNST HALPERIN; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; NOT REPORTED. (302)

calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-17-2019 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance or objection filed, the Court orders case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 3.1385. JUDGE GARRETT L. WONG; Clerk KTom. Proceedings not reported. (610)

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-19-2019 Continued To Apr-16-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-09-2014 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Mar-05-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Compel Response To Discovery, Order For The Genuineness Of Documents And Truth Of Matters Asserted
Off Calendar Dec-02-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA) N.A.'s Motion To Compel Response To Discovery, Order For The Genuineness Of Documents And Truth Of Matters Asserted is GRANTED. Defendant has waived all objections to the discovery by failing to respond. Within 30 days Defendant shall serve verified, code-compliant responses without objections to Plaintiff's first set of special interrogatories and first set of requests for inspection and production of documents, and shall produce all responsive documents in Defendant's care, custody, or control. Plaintiff's Requests for Admissions - Set One are deemed admitted by Defendant. After hearing, the Court signed the proposed order submitted with the moving papers. Judge Pro Tem: Ernst Halperin; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported.
